zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven於1343年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維時，他的父親William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven23歲，母親Mrs. Johanna Ruthven22歲。他於1370年之前與Margaret Logie結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1408年在蘇格蘭培爾盧維享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven于1343年出生在英国苏格兰培爾盧維时，他的父亲William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven23岁，母亲Mrs. Johanna Ruthven22岁。他于1370年之前与Margaret Logie结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1408年在苏格兰培爾盧維享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruthven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name, traditionally pronounced ‘Ri-ven’, from Ruthven by Huntingtower (Perthshire); also possibly from Ruthven (Angus) and various other places of that name throughout Scotland, named either with Gaelic ruadh ‘red’ + mhaighin ‘place’ or with a cognate of Welsh rhudd faen ‘red stone’. The oldest family of this name, the lords of the barony of Ruthven by Perth, were descended from Thor, son of Swain, lord of Tranent in Lothian and first sheriff of Edinburgh on record in the mid 12th century. The family eventually gained the title of Earl of Gowrie, but because of what became known as ‘the Gowrie Conspiracy’ the title was forfeited and from 1600 to 1641 the surname itself was proscribed. The title was later restored to the family, and the present Earl of Gowrie bears the surname Ruthven.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven was born in 1343, in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, was 22. He married Margaret Logie before 1370. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1408, in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven est né en 1343, à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Logie avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1408, à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven 1343 in Ruthven, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. Johanna Ruthven 22. Er hat vor 1370 Margaret Logie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1408 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven è nato il nel 1343 nel Ruthven, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Logie prima del 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1408, nel Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ruthven Laird of Ruthvenが1343年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンで生まれた時，父William Ruthven Laird of Ruthvenは23歳，母Mrs. Johanna Ruthvenは22歳であった。1370年以前にMargaret Logieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1408年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven(이)가 1343년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Johanna Ruthven(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1370년 이전 Margaret Logie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1408년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven nasceu em 1343, em Ruthven, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Logie antes 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1408, em Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven родился в 1343 г. в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Logie перед 1370 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1408 г. в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven nació en 1343, en Ruthven, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. Johanna Ruthven, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Logie antes de 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1408, en Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
